sampleRows.Q3:
1. For Final Nifty Levels upto 110% of Initial Level, 900% participation i.e. for every 1% rise in the Nifty the coupon increases by 9% and is capped at 90%
2. On the downside there is 1:1 fall i.e. for every 1% fall in Nifty the principal erodes by 1%

sampleRows.Q4:
1. For Final Nifty Levels greater than 104.8% Initial Nifty the product offers a PR of 836.7% for the first 15.3% rise in Nifty after which the coupon is capped at 128%. 
2. For Final Nifty Level at or below 104.8% of Initial Nifty the Principal erodes by 1.2 times for every 1% fall in Nifty

sampleRows.Q5:
1. For Final Nifty Levels greater than or equal to 104.6% of Initial Nifty a flat coupon of 96%.  
2. For Nifty levels less than 104.6% of Intial Nifty level, first the coupon erodes by 3 times the nifty performance and after which the Principal starts eroding by 3 times the nifty performance.

sampleRows.Q6:
1. For Final Nifty Levels at or above 104.2% of Initial Nifty a flat coupon of 99.5%.  
2. For Nifty levels below 104.2% of Intial Nifty level, first the coupon erodes by 3 times the nifty performance and after which the Principal starts eroding by 3 times the nifty performance.

sampleRows.Q17:
1. For Final Nifty Levels at or above 120% of Initial Level flat coupon of 80%
2. For Final Nifty Levels below 120% of Initial Level there is a decay of 2.15 from the coupon i.e. for every 1% fall in Nifty, first coupon reduces by 2.15% upto (-17%) after which the principal gets eroded by 2.15% for every 1% fall

sampleRows.Q18:
1. An alpha of 20% on the Nifty returns, if the Final Nifty Level is at or above 80% of Initial Level i.e. if Nifty Nifty returns are -10% then product returns will be  = -10% + 20% = 10%
2. Below 80% of Initial Level, the principal erodes by 1.25% for every % fall in Nifty.

sampleRows.Q19:
1. It is a principal protected structure
2. For Final Fixing Levels above 102% of Initial Fixing Level flat coupon of 48% else a fixed coupon of 20%

sampleRows.Q20:
1. It is a Prinicpal Protected Structure
2. For Final Nifty Levels greater than or equal to Initial Nifty the product offers a coupon of 12.40%.  
3. For Final Nifty Levels below Initial Nifty the product offers a coupon of 8.40%.

sampleRows.Q21:
1. For Final Nifty Levels greater than or equal to 101.27% Products offers 25% coupon plus 115% PR for the next 20% rise  in Nifty beyond which the coupon is capped at 48% 
2. For Final Nifty Levels below 101.27% of Initial Nifty Level product provides 25% coupon (Principal Protected)

sampleRows.Q23:
1. If on any Observation Dates if the Final Fixing Level is greater than or equal to 111% of Initial Fixing Level then coupon of 11.75% p.a plus lag period interest of 1 month @ 10%.
2. If on any observation date if the Final Fixing Level stays below 111% of Initial Level, then 0% coupon with Principal Protection

sampleRows.Q24:

2. If on any observation date if the Final Fixing Level stays below 122% of Initla Level, then 0% coupon with Principal Protection

sampleRows.Q25:

2. If on any observation date if the Final Fixing Level stays below 115% of Initial Level, then 0% coupon with Principal Protection
(Product Returns have been calculated assuming product will be autocalled on its Final Observation)

A2.cached:
1. For Final Nifty Levels at or above Initial Nifty the product offers a PR of 100%  for the first ~18% rise in Nifty.  
2. For Final Nifty Levels from 119% to 121.00% of Initial Nifty the product offers a PR of 2033.33% (1933.33%+100%). 2. For Final Nifty Levels at or above 121% of Initial Nifty the product offers a flat coupon of 79%
3. For Final Nifty Levels below Initial Nifty Level principal is protected till 20% fall in Nifty after which Principal erodes by 1.3 times (with catch up) Nifty Performance and after 30% fall in Nifty the decay will be decreased to 0.3 times

2. For Final Nifty Levels from 110% to 111.00% of Initial Nifty the product offers a PR of 2050% (1950%+100%). 2. For Final Nifty Levels at or above 111% of Initial Nifty the product offers a flat coupon of 50%
3. For Final Nifty Levels below Initial Nifty Level principal is protected till 20% fall in Nifty after which Principal erodes by 1.25 times (with catch up) Nifty Performance and after 30% fall in Nifty the decay will be decreased to 0.25 times

sampleRows.H8: Enter any ONE of the below fields

sampleRows.A2: Product Search for Debentures Details Inputs

C26.cached:
1.  For Final Sensex Levels 125% of Initial Sensex the product offers a PR of 100%.   
2. For Final Sensex Levels from 136% to 137.00% of Initial Sensex the product offers a PR of 9150% (9050%+100%). 2. For Final Sensex Levels at or above 137% of Initial Sensex the product offers a flat coupon of 102.5%
3. For Final Sensex Levels below Initial Sensex Level principal is protected till 15% fall in Sensex after which Principal erodes by 1.6 times (with catch up) Sensex Performance and after 30% fall in Sensex the decay will be decreased to 0.6 times till -90% fall
4. Beyond -90%, product returns will equal Sensex Performance
